# cloudflare_ai_gateway_dynamic_routing (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudflare_ai_gateway_dynamic_routing" "example_ai_gateway_dynamic_routing" {
  account_id = "0d37909e38d3e99c29fa2cd343ac421a"
  gateway_id = "54442216"
  elements = [{
    id = "id"
    outputs = {
      next = {
        element_id = "elementId"
      }
    }
    type = "start"
  }]
  name = "name"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String)
- `elements` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--elements))
- `gateway_id` (String)
- `name` (String)

- `created_at` (String)
- `deployment` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--deployment))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `modified_at` (String)
- `route` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--route))
- `success` (Boolean)
- `version` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--version))

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import cloudflare_ai_gateway_dynamic_routing.example '<account_id>/<gateway_id>/<id>'
```
